title: Add collective offerings tab to localities with budget integration

requirements.text: Add a 'Ofiary zbiorowe' (Collective Offerings) tab to the expanded locality card in the Miejscowości section

quotes: do sekcji Miejscowości - do dodanej miejscowości w sekcji Miejscowości - należy dodać zakładkę: "Ofiary zbiorowe"

acceptanceCriteria: When a locality card is expanded, a new 'Ofiary zbiorowe' tab is visible alongside the residents list
The tab displays a list of collective offerings associated with that locality

requirements.text: Create a form in the Collective Offerings tab to add new collective offerings with amount, date, and description fields

quotes: tutaj będziemy dodawać ofiary od całej miejscowości, które wpływają do Budżetu Parafii

acceptanceCriteria: Users can input an offering amount, date, and optional description
The form validates that amount is a positive number
Submission creates a new collective offering record linked to the locality

requirements.text: Store collective offerings in the backend with locality ID, amount, date, description, and timestamps
acceptanceCriteria: Backend defines a CollectiveOffering type with localityId, amount (Nat), date (Int), description (Text), createdAt, and updatedAt fields
Backend provides createCollectiveOffering, updateCollectiveOffering, deleteCollectiveOffering, and getCollectiveOfferingsByLocality methods
All collective offerings are persisted across canister upgrades

requirements.text: Automatically create a budget transaction entry when a collective offering is added or edited in Miejscowości

quotes: należy tak połączyć sekcje miejscowości z sekcją Budżet żeby po wpisaniu kwoty ofiary zbiorowej w sekcji Miejscowości - wyświetlała sie kwota w sekcji Budżet i od razu była odpowiednio rozliczana

acceptanceCriteria: When a collective offering is created, a corresponding budget transaction is automatically created with type 'income', category 'Ofiary zbiorowe', and the same amount and date
The budget transaction description includes the locality name
When a collective offering is edited, the corresponding budget transaction is updated to match
When a collective offering is deleted, the corresponding budget transaction is also deleted

requirements.text: Display collective offerings in the Budzet section with clear indication of their source locality

quotes: wyświetlała sie kwota w sekcji Budżet

acceptanceCriteria: Budget transactions originating from collective offerings are clearly labeled with the locality name
Users can see in the budget view which transactions came from collective offerings
The budget totals correctly include collective offering amounts

requirements.text: Allow editing and deleting collective offerings from the locality card with automatic budget synchronization
acceptanceCriteria: Users can edit existing collective offerings and see changes reflected in the budget
Users can delete collective offerings and the corresponding budget entry is removed
No orphaned budget transactions remain after collective offering deletion

constraints: Follow the same pattern used for individual offerings in Kartoteka section
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, components/ui)
nonGoals: Historical reporting or analytics beyond current budget display
